    Xspatula python and DB model environment

    Xspatula is an advanced tool for developing database integrated python packages. You can also use Xspatula just for setting up a database without using the framework for something else. The framework is freely available on GitHub.

    The get started, clone or download Xspatula from GitHub. Then follow the instructions under Setup Xspatula DB. If you get stuck have a look in the documents under Xspatula framework.

    Xspatula access and license

    The Xspatula framework is provided under the following licenses:

    • Data License: Creative Commons Attribution license (CC-BY)
    • Code License: Massachusetts Institute of Technology License (MIT License)
